title: RiskRegisterLink
description: Binds a Control to a Risk Scenario in the tenant's risk register with the residual-risk + mitigation posture the control provides. Materialises the Control → Risk edge so audit packs can answer 'which risks does this control mitigate, and what residual risk remains?'.

risk_scenario_id.description: Identifier of the Risk Scenario being mitigated (matches the tenant's risk register convention).

tenant_id.description: Owner tenant. Cross-tenant references forbidden by Cerbos policy.

mitigation_kind.description: How the control mitigates this specific risk.

residual_likelihood.description: Likelihood AFTER the control operates effectively.

residual_impact.description: Impact AFTER the control operates effectively.

residual_risk_acceptance.description: Treatment decision for the residual risk.

last_reviewed_at.description: When the binding was last re-validated.

owner_role.description: Role that owns the binding (Cerbos snake_case convention).
